title: Unofficial Patch
description: An unofficial patch created for the community, aiming to fix overlooked bugs and bring consistency across Minecraft versions.
body:
# Unoffical Patch

An unofficial patch created for the community, aiming to fix overlooked bugs and bring consistency across Minecraft versions.

## List of Changes

- **Parity**
  - [MC-188359](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC/issues/) - Burp sound does not play after drinking or after eating cake
  - Shulkers can be colored by using a dye on them in creative mode.
  - Time can be set to sunrise or sunset.
